content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-15, SecureField) but demo credentials and notes are placeholders: demo_user.txt="test", demo_password.txt="changeme", notes.txt="TBD".
Pierre: Apple's reviewer cannot test past the login screen with placeholder credentials like "test"/"changeme", which will almost certainly trigger a rejection under 2.1 for missing/insufficient demo access. Provide real, working demo credentials and notes explaining exactly how to sign in and reach core features. Update `fastlane/metadata/review_information/` with actionable content before submission.
